proposal.title: CA-TX Sign Companies Proposal
proposal.description: Separate proposal set for USA laser directory - Sign Company category

companies.notes: Full-service custom sign printing and production. Specializes in exterior/interior signs, vehicle graphics, wide-format digital printing. Serves Southern California.
25+ years experience. Specializes in laser engraving, cutting, UV printing, CNC routing, ADA-compliant Braille signs. Works with wood, acrylic, leather, metal, Mylar, foam.
Full-cycle sign making company. Laser cutting up to 2m X 4m, accuracy ±0.002. CAD services, cuts stainless steel, aluminum, titanium, carbon steel, brass.

companies.address: Brewery Art Complex, Downtown LA, CA
companies.notes: Studio environment for artists, architects, designers. Founder former Art Director of LA Times. Clients include Warner Brothers, Red Bull, Disney, Nike. Rush orders accommodated.
Full service digital printing & custom fabrication company. Specializes in acrylic fabrication, oversized laser cutting & engraving, direct printing on substrates.
Laser cutting for metals (stainless steel, aluminum, brass, copper, titanium, corten), plastics (acrylic, polycarbonate, PETG, Delrin), wood (plywood, MDF, solid wood), glass/ceramics.
Bring your own laser-safe material or choose from inventory. Cuts/engraves acrylic, wood, cardboard for signs, products, prototypes. By appointment only.

companies.company: Evans Tool and Die / Evans Metal Stamping
companies.notes: Custom laser cut steel and metal products for signage and architectural details. Precision manufacturing with creative expression.
Houston-based sign company offering laser engraving, etching, and custom signage. Also provides industrial labels and equipment labeling services.

Wholesale sign manufacturer for sign shops and resellers. Capabilities: laser engraving (up to 250 watts, 5'x5' cuts), UV flatbed/roll printing, digital cutting (Zund), sublimation, custom fabrication. Emergency/overflow work available.
Full service sign manufacturer. Wholesale ADA & directional signs, FCO letters, laser & rotary cutting and engraving, wide-format and custom printing. Family operated since 2010.
Custom laser engraving, cutting, etching and marking. Specializes in wooden shapes with clean cuts (proprietary method). Also offers 3D printing services.
Laser engraving services for trophies, plaques, signs, promotional items. Also offers color imprinting, awards, personalization. Open weekdays 9-5 Central.
Sign and banner printing, laser engraving. In-house capabilities for business cards, bulk mailings, trophies and awards.
